name: Vibes
description: Vibes — Mobile marketing platform for SMS, MMS, push notifications, and wallet passes targeting enterprise retail and brand campaigns.

seo.title: Vibes — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Vibes: Vibes — Mobile marketing platform for SMS, MMS, push notifications, and wallet passes targeting enterprise retail and brand campaigns.

when_to_use: SMS and MMS marketing campaigns for enterprise retail brands
Apple Wallet and Google Pay pass delivery for loyalty programs
Push notification campaigns for enterprise consumer apps

pros: SMS and MMS at enterprise-grade deliverability
Apple and Google wallet pass support
Proven with major US retail brands
cons: Enterprise pricing gates small teams out
In-app messaging is secondary to SMS/MMS
review.verdict: Strong SMS-first mobile marketing for US retail; wrong stack if push and in-app are your priority.
review.best_for: US retail brands running SMS, MMS, and wallet campaigns
review.not_for: Product teams or international-first mobile apps

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
